isolation.externalServices: none — tests use mock agents and harnesses

assertions.title: Custom agent registration through evaluation to telemetry

steps.expected: All 24 tests pass covering the full cross-agent telemetry pipeline
steps.observed: 24 passed in 0.12s — all 5 test classes with 24 test methods passed

evidence.testOutput:
24 passed in 0.12s (exit code 0). All 5 test classes passed:
- TestCustomAgentRegistrationAndExecution (7 tests): custom agent registration, factory registration, duplicate rejection, overwrite, unknown lookup, listing
- TestToolInvocationTelemetryInResult (7 tests): tool call metrics, token usage, latency breakdown, transcript with tool calls, per-tool breakdown, telemetry version, telemetry on error
- TestTelemetryInReportExport (5 tests): JSON export with telemetry, CSV export with telemetry, HTML export, schema JSON serialization, multiple agent results export
- TestTelemetryInAggregationAndReporting (3 tests): aggregate_telemetry, tool_performance_breakdown, multi-task same-model aggregation
- TestEndToEndCustomAgentTelemetry (2 tests): full pipeline from registry→harness→export, telemetry forward compatibility

summary: VAL-CROSS-04: PASS. All 24 tests in test_cross_agent_telemetry.py passed. The test suite comprehensively verifies that a custom agent registered via AgentRegistry (M3) runs through the evaluation harness (M2) and produces telemetry (tool invocations, latency, tokens) that appears correctly in JSON/CSV/HTML reports (M6) without schema errors. End-to-end pipeline test and forward compatibility test both pass.
